OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: To delete the PNC, CPA and PCA, from Contract Summary,enabling soft delete for cloned client contract PCA record
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: SpecifyRatesDeletePCAandCPA

omniProcessElements.name: RA_Result
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "customError" : "=IF(%DeleteObject% == \"PNC\" && %SV_ForPNC:pncCount% <= 1, $Vlocity.TRUE, $Vlocity.FALSE)", "errorMessage" : "=IF(%DeleteObject% == \"PNC\" && %SV_ForPNC:pncCount% <= 1, \"A contract must have at least one facility\", \"\")" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: UpdatePCARecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "PCARecord" : "%RecordId%", "MarkForDelete" : "=IF(%ReAdd% != $Vlocity.NULL, $Vlocity.FALSE,$Vlocity.TRUE)" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRPUpdatePCA", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DEL_NotClonedPCA
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(LA_FilterNotClonedPCA)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "PreventiveCareAgreement", "Id" : "%LA_FilterNotClonedPCA:Id%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction5", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_UpdateIsDeleteOnClonedPCA
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(LA_FilterClonedPCA)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "PCA" : "%LA_FilterClonedPCA%", "isDeleted" : true }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMUpdateClonedPCAOnCPA", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DR_FetchPCAs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "CPAId" : "=%RecordId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "PCA", "responseJSONNode" : "PCA", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRFetchPCAOfClonedContract", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_FilterClonedPCA
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(PCA)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "PCA" ], "filterListFormula" : "=Cloned_From__c != \"\" && Cloned_From__c != $Vlocity.NULL && Cloned_From__c != undefined", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_FilterNotClonedPCA
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(PCA)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "PCA" ], "filterListFormula" : "=Cloned_From__c == \"\" || Cloned_From__c == $Vlocity.NULL || Cloned_From__c == undefined", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DEL_ChildCPAs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DeleteObject% == \"PNC\" && %SV_ForPNC:pncCount% > 1 && %SV_ForPNC:cpaCount% > 0", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "ContractPaymentAgreement", "Id" : "%SV_ForPNC:cpaIds%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DEL_PNCRecs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%SV_ForPNC:pncCount% > 1", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "ProviderNetworkContract", "Id" : "%RecordId%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_ForPNC
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "pncCount" : "=COUNTQUERY (\"SELECT COUNT() FROM ProviderNetworkContract WHERE ContractId = '{0}'\" , %ContractId%)", "cpaIds" : "=QUERY(\"SELECT Id from ContractPaymentAgreement where ContractId ='{0}' AND Provider_Network_Contract__c ='{1}'\",%ContractId%, %RecordId%)", "cpaCount" : "=COUNTQUERY(\"SELECT COUNT() from ContractPaymentAgreement where ContractId ='{0}' AND Provider_Network_Contract__c ='{1}'\",%ContractId%, %RecordId%)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Del_CPARecs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DeleteObject% == \"CPA\" && ISBLANK(ClonedFrom)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "ContractPaymentAgreement", "Id" : "%RecordId%", "AllOrNone" : true } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Del_PCARecs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DeleteObject% == \"PCA\" && %IsClonedClientContract% !=true", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "PreventiveCareAgreement", "Id" : "%RecordId%", "AllOrNone" : true } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
